title: Monetary and Fiscal Policy - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Monetary and Fiscal Policy Monetary and Fiscal Policy
- Christian Friedrich Christian Friedrich is a Senior Research Advisor in the Financial Stability Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial Stability Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , International Trade and Finance , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : Graduate Institute of International and Development Studies
- Miguel Molico Miguel Molico was appointed Senior Research Director in the Financial Markets Department (FMD) in February 2024. In this role, he provides strategic direction and leadership for FMD’s research and policy work. Department(s) : Markets and Banking Department , Strategic Leadership Research Field(s) : Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Payments Economics Alma Mater : University of Pennsylvania
- Wei Dong Wei Dong is Research Advisor in the Canadian Economic Analysis Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial Stability , Strategic Leadership and Support Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , International Trade and Finance , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : University of Wisconsin
